lines.speaker: Ogre guard
lines.text: Stop, creature! Only ogres and their friends allowed in this city. Show me a sign of companionship, like a lost relic or somefing, and you may pass.

lines.speaker: Ogre guard
lines.text: Until then, back to whence you came!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I am a friend to ogres.

lines.speaker: Ogre guard
lines.text: You will be my friend only with gold. Bring me a bar of pure gold and I will let you pass.

lines.speaker: Ogre guard
lines.text: Creature, did you bring me the gold?

lines.speaker: Ogre guard
lines.text: No gold, no passage. Get out of this city!

lines.speaker: Ogre guard
lines.text: It's brought it! On your way.
